BP17-076EN.name: Mono, Immortal Garnet
BP17-076EN.cardText:
[fanfare]  Summon an Assembly Droid token.
Strike - Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it damage equal to the number of other Machina followers on your field.
[act]  [cost00] : Give this [attack] +1/[defense] +1 and Storm. Activate only if there are 5 Machina followers on your field, and only once per turn.

BP17-078EN.name: Aenea, Creative Amethyst Evolved
BP17-078EN.cardText:
On Evolve - Search your deck for a Roly-Poly Mk II, summon it, then shuffle.
On Super-Evolve - Select a Machina card in your cemetery and put it into your EX area. It costs 3 less to play this turn.

BP17-079EN.name: Nicola, Enduring Steward
BP17-079EN.cardText:
While there's another Machina follower on your field, this has Rush and Bane.
[fanfare]  If this wasn't put onto the field from hand, give it Assail.
[lastwords]  Discard 2 Machina cards: Put this into its owner's EX area and give it "This costs 1 less to play."

BP17-080EN.name: Steeled Hopes
BP17-080EN.cardText: Choose 1. (1) Search your deck for a Machina follower, reveal it, add it to your hand, then shuffle. (2) [cost06] : Search your deck for a Machina follower that costs 4 or less, a Machina follower that costs 3 or less, and a Machina follower that costs 2 or less, summon them, then shuffle.

BP17-083EN.name: Roly-Poly Mk II
BP17-083EN.cardText:
Ward.
[fanfare]  Look at the top 2 cards of your deck. You may reveal a Machina card from among them and add it to your hand. Bury the rest.

BP17-113EN.name: Hoverboard Mercenary
BP17-113EN.cardText:
[evolve]  [cost01] : Evolve this.
[fanfare]  Summon an Assembly Droid token. Put a Repair Mode token into your EX area.

BP17-114EN.name: Hoverboard Mercenary Evolved
BP17-114EN.cardText: On Evolve - Summon an Assembly Droid token. Put a Repair Mode token into your EX area.

BP17-T06EN.name: Curse of the Black Dragon TOKEN

BP17-T17EN.name: Assembly Droid TOKEN
BP17-T17EN.cardText: [act]  [engage] , bury 3 Machina followers: Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 5 damage.

BP17-SL20EN.name: Mono, Immortal Garnet
BP17-SL20EN.cardText:
[fanfare]  Summon an Assembly Droid token.
Strike - Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it damage equal to the number of other Machina followers on your field.
[act]  [cost00] : Give this [attack] +1/[defense] +1 and Storm. Activate only if there are 5 Machina followers on your field, and only once per turn.

ECP02-033EN.name: Hiromi Seki [Twinkle in My Eye] Evolved

ECP02-057EN.name: Takumi Mukai [No One Can Stop Me]

ECP02-SP01EN.name: Minami Nitta [Goddess by the Sunlit Sea]

ECP02-SP08EN.name: Riamu Yumemi [Shout It to the World]

BP05-025EN.name: Disciple of Usurpation
BP05-025EN.cardText:
Storm.
Strike: Each opponent puts the top card of their deck into their cemetery. Then, if there are at least 10 cards in opponents' cemeteries, give this follower [attack] +2.

BP11-018EN.name: Nahtnaught, Cursed Queen
BP11-018EN.cardText:
[fanfare]  Search your deck for a 1-cost [swordcraft]  card, put it into your EX area, then shuffle.
[act]  [cost00] : Select an enemy follower on the field and engage it. It becomes Boxed until the end of its controller's next turn. Activate only once per turn. (Boxed followers lose all abilities and don't refresh during the start phase.)

BP11-P07EN.name: Naht's Henchman
BP11-P07EN.cardText:
This card costs 1 less to play from the EX area if there's a Nahtnaught, Cursed Queen on your field.
----------
[fanfare]  If there's a Nahtnaught, Cursed Queen on your field, draw a card.

BP11-075EN.name: Dead to Rights
BP11-075EN.cardText:
[act]  Banish this card and an Iceschillendrig, Gilded Autocrat from your cemetery: Select an enemy follower on the field and engage it.
----------
[quick]
Select an enemy follower on the field and give it [attack] -2/[defense] -2.

BP14-018EN.name: Taketsumi, Aconite Paladin
BP14-018EN.cardText:
[adv]  [cost04] , banish this: You may summon a Taketsumi, Creator of Paradise from your evolve deck. Activate only if there are at least 5 Festive cards or at least 10 [swordcraft]  cards in your cemetery.
[fanfare]  Draw a card. Discard a card. Put a Glittering Gold token into your EX area.

BP14-022EN.name: Jiemon, Thief Lord
BP14-022EN.cardText:
[evolve]  [cost01] : Evolve this.
Each other Festive follower on your field has Storm.
[fanfare]  Put a Glittering Gold token into your EX area.

BP14-025EN.name: Hero of the Hunt
BP14-025EN.cardText: Select an enemy follower on the field. Deal it 5 damage, put a Glittering Gold token into your EX area, and, if there are at least 5 Festive cards or at least 10 [swordcraft]  cards in your cemetery, search your deck for a Taketsumi, Aconite Paladin, summon it, then shuffle.

BP14-026EN.name: Masterful Musician
BP14-026EN.cardText:
[evolve]  [cost01] : Evolve this.
[fanfare]  Put a Glittering Gold token into your EX area. If there's a Jiemon, Thief Lord on your field, give your leader [defense] +3.

BP14-030EN.name: Front Desk Frog
BP14-030EN.cardText:
[evolve]  [cost01] : Evolve this.
[fanfare]  Put a Glittering Gold token into your EX area. If there's a Jiemon, Thief Lord on your field, evolve this.

BP14-034EN.name: Night on the Town
BP14-034EN.cardText: Choose 1. (1) Select an enemy follower on the field. Deal it 2 damage and put a Glittering Gold token into your EX area. (2) Select an enemy follower on the field and, if there are at least 3 Festive cards in your EX area, deal it 4 damage.

BP14-035EN.name: Haggler's Gambit
BP14-035EN.cardText:
This costs 1 less to play if there are at least 3 cards in your EX area named Glittering Gold.
----------
Draw a card. Put a Glittering Gold token into your EX area.

BP14-115EN.name: Stay in Paradise
BP14-115EN.cardText: Look at the top 4 cards of your deck. You may put a Festive card from among them into your EX area. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.

BP14-118EN.name: Torchbearing Guide
BP14-118EN.cardText: [fanfare]  Put a Festive card from your hand into your EX area: Draw a card. If there are at least 3 Festive cards in your EX area, give this [attack] +1/[defense] +1.

BP14-019EN.name: Taketsumi, Creator of Paradise
BP14-019EN.cardText:
[fanfare]  Summon 2 Sootspawn tokens.
[act]  [engage] : Select an enemy follower on the field. Deal 5 damage to it and 3 damage to its leader.

BP14-023EN.name: Jiemon, Thief Lord Evolved
BP14-023EN.cardText:
Each other Festive follower on your field has Storm.
On Evolve - Banish 2 cards named Glittering Gold from your EX area: Look at the top 5 cards of your deck. You may put a Festive card that costs 3 or less from among them into your EX area. It costs 3 less to play this turn. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.
[act]  [cost01] : Play this follower's On Evolve ability.

BP14-027EN.name: Masterful Musician Evolved
BP14-027EN.cardText:
Whenever a Glittering Gold token is put into your EX area, select an enemy follower on the field. Deal 3 damage to it and 1 damage to its leader.
On Evolve - Put a Glittering Gold token into your EX area.

BP14-031EN.name: Front Desk Frog Evolved
BP14-031EN.cardText: On Evolve - Select an enemy follower on the field. Deal it 2 damage and, if there are at least 3 Festive cards in your EX area, draw a card.

BP14-T01EN.name: Sootspawn TOKEN
BP14-T01EN.cardText:
Ward.
[lastwords]  Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 2 damage.

BP14-T02EN.name: Glittering Gold TOKEN
BP14-T02EN.cardText: [act]  [cost01] , banish this and 2 other cards named Glittering Gold from your EX area: Give your leader [defense] +1. Draw a card.

BP16-022EN.name: Ginne, Bewitching Courtesan
BP16-022EN.cardText: [fanfare]  Choose up to 2. If there's a Jiemon, Thief Lord on your field, choose up to 3 instead. (1) Select an enemy follower on the field and engage it. It doesn't refresh during its controller's next start phase. (2) Draw a card. Put a card from your hand on the top or bottom of your deck. (3) Put 2 Glittering Gold tokens into your EX area.

SDD02-006EN.name: Leod, the Crescent Blade
SDD02-006EN.cardText:
[evolve]  [cost02] : Evolve this.
While this is reserved on your field, it has Intimidate and Aura. (Followers with Intimidate can't be attacked.)
At the start of your end phase, select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 1 damage.

SDD02-007EN.name: Leod, the Crescent Blade Evolved
SDD02-007EN.cardText:
While this is reserved on your field, it has Intimidate and Aura. (Cards with Aura can't be selected for enemy spells or abilities.)
On Evolve - Select an enemy leader or enemy follower on the field and deal it 2 damage.
At the start of your end phase, select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 1 damage.

PR-173EN.name: Aenea, Amethyst Rebel
PR-173EN.cardText:
[fanfare]  Search your deck for a Machina follower that costs 3 or less, summon it, then shuffle your deck.
[lastwords]  Give your leader [defense] +2.

PR-358EN.name: Mechagun Wielder
PR-358EN.cardText:
[fanfare]  Put an Assembly Droid or Repair Mode token into your EX area.
[lastwords]  Discard a Machina card: Draw a card.

PR-170EN.name: Assembly Droid TOKEN
PR-170EN.cardText: [act]  [engage] , bury 3 Machina followers: Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 5 damage.

BP07-075EN.name: Alpha Drive
BP07-075EN.cardText: Choose one of the following. (1) Select a Machina follower in your cemetery and add it to your hand. (2) Select a Mono, Garnet Rebel in your cemetery and summon it.

BP07-P22EN.name: Nicola, Forbidden Strength
BP07-P22EN.cardText:
[evolve]  [cost01] : Evolve this follower.
[fanfare]  Bury the top 2 cards of your deck.

BP07-SL13EN.name: Mono, Garnet Rebel
BP07-SL13EN.cardText:
[evolve]  [cost01] : Evolve this follower. Activate only if there are 5 Machina followers on your field.
[act]  Banish 2 Machina cards from your cemetery: Summon an Assembly Droid token. Activate only once per turn.

BP07-077EN.name: Nicola, Forbidden Strength Evolved
BP07-077EN.cardText: On Evolve - Select a Machina card that costs 2 or less in your cemetery and put it into your EX area. It costs 2 less to play this turn.

BP07-U05EN.name: Mono, Garnet Rebel Evolved
BP07-U05EN.cardText:
Storm.
[act]  [cost02] , banish an Alpha Drive from your cemetery: Give each Machina follower on your field [attack] +2/[defense] +2 and Rush. Activate only once per turn.

BP12-075EN.name: Friends Forever
BP12-075EN.cardText: Select up to 2 Machina followers that cost a total of 5 or less in your cemetery and summon them.

BP12-082EN.name: Roly-Poly Mk I
BP12-082EN.cardText:
Ward.
While there's an Aenea, Amethyst Rebel on your field, if this follower would take more than 1 damage, it takes 1 instead.
[act]  [cost01] : Summon this card from your cemetery. Give it [attack] +1 and "[lastwords]  Banish this card." Activate only if there's an Aenea, Amethyst Rebel on your field.

BP12-SL22EN.name: Garnet Waltz
BP12-SL22EN.cardText: Choose one. (1) Deal 2 damage to each enemy leader and 1 damage to your own. (2) Summon an Assembly Droid token. Put an Assembly Droid token into your EX area. If there's a Mono, Garnet Rebel on your field, summon the second token instead.

BP12-T10EN.name: Assembly Droid TOKEN
BP12-T10EN.cardText: [act]  [engage] , bury 3 Machina followers: Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 5 damage.

SDD05-012EN.name: Dead to Rights
SDD05-012EN.cardText:
[act]  Banish this and an Iceschillendrig, Gilded Autocrat from your cemetery: Select an enemy follower on the field and engage it.
----------
[quick]
Select an enemy follower on the field and give it [attack] -2/[defense] -2.
